links.name: Stremio
links.info: Unified streaming hub. Add Torrentio addon for real content. Legally grey but technically clean.

links.name: Jellyfin
links.info: Self-hosted media server. Free, open-source, no Plex telemetry or paywalls.

links.name: MyNoise
links.info: Scientifically calibrated ambient noise. Focus, sleep, masking. One-time donation unlocks all.

links.name: Kagi Search
links.info: Paid search engine. No ads, no tracking, no SEO slop. Earns every cent.

links.name: Migadu
links.info: Honest email hosting. Transparent pricing, no per-address fees, no privacy theatre.

links.name: Photopea
links.info: Browser-based Photoshop alternative. PSD, AI, XD support. No install, free.

links.name: Excalidraw
links.info: Minimal whiteboard / diagram tool. E2E encrypted sharing, no account needed.

links.name: Bitwarden Web
links.info: Open-source password manager. Self-hostable via Vaultwarden — full feature parity, free.

links.name: Tabby Terminal
links.info: Modern cross-platform terminal. SSH manager, split panes, theme support. Electron but earns it.

links.name: Syncthing
links.info: Decentralised file sync. No server, no account, no cloud middleman. Pure P2P.

links.name: Mullvad VPN
links.info: No-account VPN. Pay with cash or crypto. Audited, warrant canary maintained.

links.name: BrowserLeaks
links.info: Full browser fingerprint and leak audit. JS, WebRTC, fonts, canvas — all exposed.

links.name: Have I Been Pwned
links.info: Check email against known breach databases. Troy Hunt runs it personally.

links.name: DNS Leak Test
links.info: Verify your DNS resolver isn't leaking past your VPN or custom config.

links.name: Privacy Guides
links.info: Community-maintained, no-affiliate tool recommendations. Saner than most.

links.name: 2FA Directory
links.info: Check which services support 2FA and what type before committing.

links.name: Shodan
links.info: Search engine for exposed devices and services. Check your own exposure.

links.name: Arch Wiki
links.info: The definitive Linux reference. Distro-agnostic in practice.

links.name: Awesome Self-Hosted
links.info: Curated index of self-hostable software. First stop for any new service search.

links.name: Dockge
links.info: Compose-native Docker stack manager. Reactive UI, no agent bloat. Portainer done right.

links.name: DistroWatch
links.info: Linux distro news, release tracking, comparison. Useful when recommending an OS.

links.name: MDN Web Docs
links.info: The web platform reference. HTML, CSS, JS — source of truth.

links.name: GitHub
links.info: Largest code host. Mirror here for visibility and discoverability.

links.name: Lucide Icons
links.info: Searchable icon library. Source for all data-lucide attribute values.

links.name: Regex101
links.info: Interactive regex builder with full match explanation and token breakdown.

links.name: Cron Guru
links.info: Cron expression editor and human-readable explainer.

links.name: Go Playground
links.info: Run Go snippets in the browser. No toolchain install needed.

links.name: Rust Playground
links.info: Browser-based Rust compiler. Test, share, iterate without local setup.

links.name: Godbolt
links.info: Compiler Explorer. See generated assembly for any language, any compiler, any flags.

links.name: tldr.sh
links.info: Simplified man pages. Practical examples only. Community-maintained.

links.name: Claude
links.info: Best-in-class for code, reasoning, and long-context. The actual tool.

links.name: Chub.ai
links.info: Character and roleplay AI hub. Massive catalogue, mostly free, actually works.

links.name: Venice.ai
links.info: Private, uncensored AI inference. Runs on user's behalf — no conversation logging.

links.name: Ollama
links.info: Local LLM runner. Pull any model, run fully offline. Zero telemetry.

links.name: Hugging Face
links.info: Model hub for local inference. Source for Ollama, llama.cpp, and Automatic1111 weights.

links.name: Arxiv CS
links.info: CS preprints. ML, systems, security, crypto. No paywall, ever.

links.name: Monero Observer
links.info: Independent XMR news aggregator. No ads, no coin shill, just signal.

links.name: RTINGS
links.info: Objective hardware reviews with real measurements. TVs, monitors, headphones, laptops.

links.name: DeepL Translate
links.info: Consistently better translation quality than Google. EU-based, no selling data.

links.name: Alternativeto
links.info: Find alternatives to any software. Filter: open-source, self-hosted, platform.

links.name: Internet Archive
links.info: Wayback Machine, free books, software, music. The actual digital preservation org.

links.name: Anna's Archive
links.info: Largest shadow library index. Books, papers, comics. Knowledge should be free.

links.name: Openverse
links.info: Search for openly-licensed images, audio, and video. Safe for any project.

links.name: Worldtimebuddy
links.info: Visual timezone converter and meeting scheduler. The good one for coordinating across regions.
